---
title: "Pretraining experiment reports"
---

Experiment reports from [seqax](https://github.com/clankur/seqax), a small LLM pretraining codebase in JAX.

| Report | Summary |
|--------|---------|
| [Shared KV](shared_kv.qmd) | Tying keys and values in multi-head attention — tested at 270M and 1B on C4 |
| [Position Embeddings](position_embeddings.qmd) | CoPE vs ALiBi vs RoPE at 31M scale |
| [Power Scheduler](power_scheduler.qmd) | 95-run HPO sweep of the power-law LR schedule vs cosine at 37M |
| [LCM](lcm.qmd) | Jointly-trained Large Concept Model for KV cache compression at 31M |

## Acknowledgements

Thanks to the [MatX team](https://matx.com/) for their implementation of GPT in seqax which I used as a base to implement all my experiments.

Thanks to the [Google TPU Research Cloud](https://sites.research.google/trc/about/), which has supported my investigations.
